title: Coverage 69.6% — server bootstrap and some error branches unexercised
evidence: scores.json test_coverage=0.696; main.go:9-32 (ListenAndServe) and 500-path branches in handlers.go have no test
suggestion: Optional: add a test for the 500 branch and factor main() so startup is testable

title: 400 branches for malformed JSON body and non-numeric id path are untested
evidence: handlers.go:32-34 (decode error) and :64-67 (strconv.ParseInt error) have no corresponding test in handlers_test.go
suggestion: Add tests posting invalid JSON and GET /books/abc to lock in the 400 responses

title: go.mod pins go 1.26.4 but README states Go 1.22+
evidence: go.mod:3 `go 1.26.4` vs README.md:10 'Go 1.22+'; the higher directive can block builds on older toolchains that would otherwise suffice
suggestion: Lower the go directive to 1.22 to match the actual language feature used (ServeMux routing) and the README

title: Env-configurable listen address and DB path beyond spec
TDD discipline (P1-P4) is self-reported, not independently verifiable from final artifacts
evidence: _agent_stdout.log: 'built test-first throughout ... confirmed red via build failures before implementing'; no commit history retained in run_dir to confirm red/green/refactor cadence
suggestion: None actionable; layered store+handler tests are consistent with a test-first workflow
